message:
feat(daemon): surface dropped log events in state.json (bd-137)

Add dropped_log_events counter to Counters struct and wire it through
maybe_write_state so operators can monitor logger back-pressure via
state.json. Uses serde(default) for backward-compatible deserialization.

Also includes:
- RedWren: thread spawn error propagation in loop_main.rs (Result instead
  of expect/panic), protection.rs format cleanup (as_deref)
- WhiteDuck/RedWren: ballast_total_pool_bytes overflow-safe helper in
  status JSON output, plus tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
